title: Type
description: A type definition for some HL7v2 type (incl. Segments and Datatypes).

fields.description: The (sub) fields this type has (if not primitive).

name.description: The name of this type. This would be the segment or datatype name. For example, "PID" or "XPN".

primitive.description: If this is a primitive type then this field is the type of the primitive For example, STRING. Leave unspecified for composite types.
